text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: "Dear Mom, how are you doing?"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"I'm having a great time! Each day is filled with so much excitement,
it's almost hard to keep up."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"We had a triathlon at the academy recently, and can you believe it? I
entered the competition!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"It was sooooo much fun! But it's all the other competitors that
impressed me the most. They were amazing!"

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The older racers gave me lots of courage. Just like them, I want to
inspire others with my running.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Also, I want to keep running with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"Just announced—the Tracen Academy Team Triathlon"...
We're having a triathlon?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know the school held triathlons for us! It looks like this one is
sponsored by a sporting goods manufacturer to celebrate their
anniversary.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It says they're accepting entries now! It's four people per team, so...
Dia, that means we can enter together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I was just about to say that!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've always wanted to enter one of the academy's events! And since
this one's an anniversary, it has a fun festival feel to it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sounds like the festival lover in you is already getting excited!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I guess so! But you're pretty full of enthusiasm yourself!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Come on, we have teammates to find!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's start by asking around class!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
"There are three disciplines in the triathlon—swimming, cycling, and
running. In Tracen's triathlon, running is split into two segments,
making for a four-person relay." Sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that sounds like the perfect event for a multi-talented athlete
like you. Will you participate?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Definitely! I can already feel my muscles getting fired up for it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My, then we mustn't let their excitement go to waste! Would you
allow me to join your team?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You wanna join me?! Yeah, please do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I, Mejiro Bright, will make every effort to be a useful
member of your team!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's make sure we win this, dear Sister!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you sound even more pumped than I am! All right, let's do this,
Bright!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "Triathlon entry requirements"... Oh, they have special
rules. "Kickboard use is permitted." "The first running segment
involves a mission."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"Details of the mission will be announced on the day of the event"?
That sounds like fun! Think I'll scout out some more info. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"First-place and honorary winners will receive prizes from the sporting
goods company." The grand prize is... a buffet at a luxury hotel?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Buffet means... all you can eat, right?! Drool.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It says here the triathlon will be broadcast on TV! You interested,
Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Well that was blunt... I'd expect nothing less from you though!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think it could be interesting though? We could team up
with racers from other distances who we usually wouldn't get a chance
to run with!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Are you going to enter?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, I am interested... but I'd like to think on it before I make a
decision!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In this spectacular anniversary event, I must take to the stage for the
sake of Tracen Academy's honor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention for the sake of the producers of the various garments
that adorn my body on a daily basis! Let the Overlord perform the
greatest show of all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're even thinking of the academy and the sports company. Wow,
you're amazing, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! It comes naturally to the Overlord! Now, let us assemble our
cast right away!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... "Display the fruits of your daily training and make this event a
thrilling success worthy of Tracen Academy! —Director Akikawa"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! As the class rep, this is where I must step up! I'll take the initiative
to enter so the event gains popularity!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I have received the director's instructions loud and clear! I know what
I must do—swap out all the bicycles for crayfish!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No, I should just jump into the sea and become a whirlpool! Where's
the most interesting team? Come on out!
